label: Options Controls
description: Asset class, venue, settlement type, main tab selector, and watchlist toggle for options and futures.

0.1.note: WidgetErrorBoundary in widget-wrapper.tsx covers all grid widgets.

0.4.note: No any types or @ts-ignore in widget file.

0.5.note: Widget file does not import from lib/mocks/.

0.6.note: Pure control bar; no data to load; all state is synchronous context state.

0.7.note: Pure control bar; no data list to be empty; renders selectors unconditionally.

0.8.note: Pure control bar; no data fetching; no error state applicable.

1.1.note: Widget reads all state and setters exclusively from useOptionsData().

1.3.note: Control bar drives asset/venue selection; it is the input, not a filtered output.

1.4.note: Control bar is not filtered by client.

1.5.note: Control bar is not filtered by strategy.

1.6.note: Control bar renders unconditionally; no data list to default.

1.7.note: No reference data constants in widget file.

l1.notes: Pure UI widget; 1.3–1.7 N/A per spec note.

l2.notes: Covered globally by commits 32ba8ab (structured {domain,tier} entitlements across all 17 register.ts files + 5 PageEntitlementGate wrappers) and f9f29ea (65 automated tests). Re-audit only if entitlements change.

3.1.note: Mode relevance: live ✓ / paper ✓ / batch ✓ — control bar always shown; asset selection meaningful in all modes.

3.2.note: Context reads mode from useExecutionMode() at context line 129; mode propagated via context value.

3.5.note: Paper mode: identical UI, asset/venue selection routes to paper order flow.

3.6.note: No WebSocket/interval in widget or control bar.

4.1.note: No dead onClick handlers in widget file; all handlers passed to OptionsToolbar from context.

5.1.note: Serves all options and futures strategies on the options tab as primary configuration entry point. Strategy applicability determined by downstream widgets driven by this control bar.

7.1.note: No hardcoded hex/rgb/hsl colors in widget file.

7.2.note: No mock data imports in widget file.

7.3.note: Widget file is 33 lines; well within 500-line limit.

7.5.note: Out of scope — English-only UI per product decision 2026-04-21; 7.5 reassigned to UTC datetime rendering

7.6.note: No security anti-patterns in widget file.

7.7.note: No inline objects/arrays in effect deps; pure prop pass-through.

8.1.note: No text-[...] or fontSize= in widget file.

8.2.note: No arbitrary spacing tokens in widget file.

8.3.note: Widget delegates entirely to OptionsToolbar from shared trading panel.

8.4.note: Agent grep: no accessibility violations in widget file. Human keyboard+screen-reader pass for OptionsToolbar required.

keepSeparate.rationale: Singleton control bar at top row — standard layout pattern, must remain separate from data widgets.

relationships.notes: Drives assetClass, venue, settlement, and activeTab that all other options widgets consume from OptionsDataContext. (options-trade-panel + futures-trade-panel + options-scenario absorbed into their host widgets on 2026-04-22 WU-3.)

dataContract.notes: Pure UI state widget; no backend data channel needed. Venue and asset lists are config constants.

gaps: Sports/DeFi options not in scope for this control bar
coverage.notes: Controls broker between crypto (Deribit) and TradFi (CBOE/CME) via isCrypto flag.

findings.description: options-control-bar-widget.tsx — 0 direct user-visible strings in widget file; OptionsToolbar strings not audited here
findings.fix: Retired 7.5 i18n check: English-only UI per product decision 2026-04-21
